│       │               ├── Theme.kt
│       │               ├── ThemeHelper.kt
│       │               └── Type.kt
│       │
│       ├── debug/                                        ← Debug-variant source set (debug builds only)
│       │   ├── AndroidManifest.xml                      ← Declares HiltTestActivity (no launcher intent)
│       │   └── java/com/example/fyp/
│       │       └── HiltTestActivity.kt                  ← Empty ComponentActivity host for instrumentation tests
│       │
│       ├── test/java/com/example/fyp/
│       │   ├── appstate/
│       │   │   └── AppViewModelTest.kt                   ← App-wide state & notification tests
│       │   ├── core/
│       │   │   ├── ConstantsTest.kt                       ← UI, AI, data, generation constant validation
│       │   │   ├── ErrorMessagesTest.kt
│       │   │   ├── FeatureFlagDefaultsTest.kt             ← Remote Config feature flag default values
│       │   │   ├── FontSizeUtilsTest.kt
│       │   │   ├── LanguagePairCacheTest.kt
│       │   │   ├── PaginationTest.kt
│       │   │   ├── ViewModelHelpersTest.kt                ← LanguagePairCache tests
│       │   │   ├── connectivity/
│       │   │   │   └── NetworkRetryTest.kt
│       │   │   ├── extensions/
│       │   │   │   └── ExtensionFunctionsTest.kt
│       │   │   ├── performance/
│       │   │   │   └── PerformanceUtilsTest.kt            ← Debounce, throttle, cache tests
│       │   │   └── security/
│       │   │       ├── AuditLoggerTest.kt
│       │   │       ├── SanitizeInputExtendedTest.kt      ← Extended sanitization edge-case tests
│       │   │       ├── CertificatePinningTest.kt         ← Certificate pinning config tests
│       │   │       └── SecurityUtilsTest.kt               ← Validation & sanitization tests

│       │   │   ├── DataLayerIntegrationTest.kt            ← Cross-repository data layer integration tests

│       │   │   │   ├── AzureVoiceConfigTest.kt
│       │   │   │   ├── LanguageDisplayNamesTest.kt

│       │   │   │   └── CloudTranslatorLogicTest.kt        ← Translator client logic tests

│       │   │   │   ├── CloudQuizClientTest.kt             ← Quiz client logic tests

│       │   │   │   └── TranslationCacheDataTest.kt        ← Cache data model tests
│       │   │   ├── database/
│       │   │   │   ├── DatabaseUtilsTest.kt               ← Firestore batch constant test
│       │   │   │   └── DataCleanupUtilsTest.kt            ← Old doc deletion, archive, cleanup tests
│       │   │   ├── feedback/
│       │   │   │   └── FirestoreFeedbackRepositoryTest.kt ← Feedback repository tests
│       │   │   ├── friends/
│       │   │   │   ├── ChatRepositoryLogicTest.kt         ← Chat repository logic tests
│       │   │   │   ├── FirestoreChatRepositoryTest.kt     ← Chat repository integration test
│       │   │   │   ├── FriendRequestRateLimiterTest.kt    ← Friend request rate limiting tests
│       │   │   │   ├── FriendsCacheExtendedTest.kt        ← Friends, blocked, friendship cache tests

│       │   │   │   ├── FriendsRepositoryLogicTest.kt      ← Friends repository logic tests

│       │   │   │   ├── SharedFriendsDataSourceTest.kt     ← Shared friends data source tests

│       │   │   │   └── SharingRepositoryLogicTest.kt      ← Sharing repository logic tests

│       │   │   │   ├── SharedSettingsDataSourceLogicTest.kt ← Settings data source logic tests

│       │   │   │   └── StandardTextFieldsTest.kt          ← Input/validation toggle tests
│       │   │   └── theme/
│       │   │       ├── ColorPaletteTest.kt
│       │   │       ├── ThemeHelperExtendedTest.kt         ← Auto theme, dark/light/system tests
│       │   │       └── ThemeHelperTest.kt
│       │   └── utils/
│       │       ├── ErrorHandlingTest.kt
│       │       └── ErrorMessageMapperTest.kt
│       │
│       └── androidTest/java/com/example/fyp/        ← Instrumented (on-device) UI tests
│           ├── HiltTestRunner.kt                    ← Custom test runner wiring Hilt into instrumented tests
│           └── screens/login/
│               └── LoginScreenSmokeTest.kt          ← Compose UI smoke tests for login screen
│
└── fyp-backend/
    ├── firebase.json
    ├── firestore.rules                             ← Security rules (with rate_limits explicit deny, settings field validation)
    ├── firestore.indexes.json                      ← Composite indexes: friend_requests, shared_inbox, custom_words, user_search, quiz_attempts
    ├── .firebaserc
    └── functions/
        ├── package.json
        ├── package-lock.json
        ├── tsconfig.json
        ├── tsconfig.dev.json
        ├── .eslintrc.js
        ├── jest.config.js                          ← Jest + ts-jest config for backend unit tests
        └── src/
            ├── index.ts                            ← Slim entry point — re-exports all Cloud Functions
            ├── helpers.ts                          ← Shared helpers: auth, validation, rate limiting, secrets
            ├── logger.ts                           ← Structured JSON logging for Cloud Logging
            ├── translation.ts                      ← getSpeechToken, translateText(s), detectLanguage
            ├── learning.ts                         ← generateLearningContent (Azure OpenAI)
            ├── coins.ts                            ← awardQuizCoins (anti-cheat), spendCoins
            ├── notifications.ts                    ← FCM triggers: chat, friend request, accepted, shared inbox + spam detection
            ├── maintenance.ts                      ← Scheduled: pruneStaleTokens, pruneStaleRateLimits, repairFriendsData
            ├── health.ts                           ← Healthcheck HTTP endpoint (validates GenAI config)
            └── __tests__/
                ├── helpers.test.ts                 ← 29 unit tests for validation helpers
                ├── logger.test.ts                  ← 6 unit tests for structured logger
                ├── translation.test.ts             ← 15 unit tests for getSpeechToken, translateText(s), detectLanguage
                ├── coins.test.ts                   ← 26 unit tests for awardQuizCoins and spendCoins
                ├── notifications.test.ts           ← 12 unit tests for FCM triggers and spam detection
                ├── health.test.ts                  ← Healthcheck endpoint tests
                ├── rate-limit.test.ts              ← Rate limiting validation tests
                ├── learning.test.ts                ← 20 unit tests for AI learning content generation callable
                ├── learning-sync.test.ts           ← 6 unit tests for learning sync operations
                ├── maintenance.test.ts             ← 9 unit tests for scheduled maintenance handlers
                ├── maintenance-deep.test.ts        ← 3 unit tests for deep maintenance tests
                ├── notifications-deep.test.ts      ← 11 unit tests for deep notification tests
                ├── firestore-rules.test.ts         ← 6 unit tests for Firestore security rules
                └── index.test.ts                   ← 2 unit tests for main entry point                           ← Quick start guide for Gantt chart generation
